title: 10 best herbal tinctures for bronchitis
description: Frankincense tinctures helps with bronchitis because of its potent anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which help to reduce inflammation in the airways and relieve coughing spasms. The Boswellia resin present in frankincense tinctures has been shown to inhibit the production of pro-inflammatory chemicals, thereby reducing swelling and congestion in the lungs and bronchial tubes.
